title: Theft
description: Dishonest taking of movable property out of the possession of another person without their consent. Applies when someone steals, takes, or removes belongings without permission.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both.

title: Punishment for Theft
description: Punishment provision for the offence of theft where movable property is dishonestly removed from someone's possession without consent. Applicable in all theft cases including petty theft, vehicle theft, and shoplifting.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both.

title: Theft in Dwelling House
description: Theft committed in a building, tent, or vessel used as a dwelling house or for the custody of property. Applies when someone breaks into or enters a home, flat, shop, or office and steals property.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Murder
description: Intentional unlawful killing of another human being with premeditation. Applies when a person is deliberately killed with intent to cause death or grievous bodily harm likely to cause death.
punishment: Death or life imprisonment with fine.

title: Attempt to Murder
description: Attempted killing with intent to cause death. Applies when the accused attacked the victim with a lethal weapon intending to kill, but the victim survived.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 10 years, or life if hurt is caused.

title: Voluntarily Causing Hurt
description: Causing bodily pain or injury to a person voluntarily without the use of dangerous weapons. Applies in minor fistfights, slapping, pushing, or physical altercations that do not result in grievous injury.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 1 year, or fine up to 1000 rupees, or both.

title: Voluntarily Causing Hurt by Dangerous Weapons
description: Causing hurt using a weapon such as a knife, rod, acid, or any item likely to cause death or grievous injury. Applies when the accused used a sharp object, firearm, or corrosive substance to attack someone.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both.

title: Voluntarily Causing Grievous Hurt
description: Causing severe, permanent or dangerous injury to the victim. Applies when the victim suffers broken bones, loss of a body part, permanent disfigurement, or long-term incapacitation due to the assault.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Assault on Woman to Outrage Modesty
description: Assault on a woman with the intent to outrage her modesty. Applies to cases of unwanted touching, groping, molestation, or any physical assault on a woman with sexual intent or to insult her dignity.
punishment: Imprisonment between 1 year and 5 years, and fine.

title: Rape
description: Non-consensual sexual intercourse or sexual assault on a woman. Applies when a woman is forced into sexual acts against her will or without her consent.
punishment: Rigorous imprisonment not less than 10 years, extendable to life.

title: Kidnapping
description: Taking away or enticing a minor or any person from their lawful guardianship without consent. Applies when a child or person is abducted from home or family.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Kidnapping with Intent to Secretly and Wrongfully Confine
description: Kidnapping or abducting a person with intent to cause that person to be secretly and wrongfully confined. Applies when a person is forcibly taken and held against their will in a secret location.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Robbery
description: Theft with the use of force, fear, or threat on the victim. Applies when the offender snatched property by threatening, pushing, or directly assaulting the victim at the time of theft.
punishment: Rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years and fine.

title: Dacoity
description: Robbery committed by a gang of five or more persons. Applies when multiple people together commit robbery with force or violence.
punishment: Life imprisonment or rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years, and fine.

title: Criminal Breach of Trust
description: Dishonest misappropriation of property entrusted to a person. Applies when someone abuses their position of trust — like an employee, contractor, or agent — and misuses the property or money given to them.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both.

title: Cheating and Inducing Delivery of Property
description: Deceiving someone dishonestly to induce them to hand over property, money, or valuables. Applies to online fraud, impersonation, false promises, fake investments, and scams.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Cruelty by Husband or Relatives
description: Physical or mental cruelty inflicted on a wife by her husband or his relatives. Applies to domestic violence, dowry harassment, threats, and abuse within marriage.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years and fine.

title: Criminal Intimidation
description: Threatening a person to cause harm to their life, property, or reputation to compel them to act against their will. Applies when someone receives threatening calls, messages, or verbal threats.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both.

title: Wrongful Restraint
description: Unlawfully obstructing a person from proceeding in a direction they have a right to go. Applies when a person is stopped, blocked, or detained against their will.
punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 1 month, or fine up to 500 rupees.

title: Criminal Trespass
description: Unlawfully entering into or upon property in possession of another person with intent to commit an offence or to intimidate. Applies when someone illegally enters a house, shop, land, or compound.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months, or fine up to 500 rupees, or both.
